title: ferray-strings: no str_len function — can't get elementwise string lengths
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.strings.str_len(arr) / np.char.str_len(arr) returns an integer array of string lengths. ferray-strings has no equivalent. Getting the length of each string in an array is a fundamental operation needed for padding decisions, validation, and statistics. Simple to add via map_to_typed(|s| s.len() as i64).
